info.name: Delippy AI Service - Chat Pipeline Regression Tests
info.description: Rewritten after the 2026-07-07 refactor: (1) pluggable LLM provider (AI_PROVIDER env var), (2) the old 'ask the user to teach the system' learning loop was fully removed (data-poisoning risk in aliases.json) and replaced by a 2-tier LLM query-expansion retry (free tier-1 from the AI parser, lazy tier-2 only on a genuine zero-result search), (3) memory_resolver.py no longer wipes conversation memory on cosmetic category-wording changes or on PRODUCT_INFO/COMPARE turns, (4) a zero-cost local-memory filter answers follow-ups from already-fetched products before hitting the API again, (5) asking about an unresolvable product reference (e.g. 'no' among 20 just-shown items) now asks a clarifying question instead of crashing, (6) history RAG (Mongo scan + cosine similarity) is now lazy - only computed when an LLM fallback call actually needs it. A collection-level test asserts no request ever 500s and the removed LEARNING_PROMPT/LEARNING_RESUME summaries never reappear. Run each folder top-to-bottom - multi-step folders reuse the same session_id to simulate a real conversation.

exec: pm.test('learning loop stays removed - LEARNING_PROMPT/LEARNING_RESUME must never appear again', () => {

item.name: 0. Health
Health check
1. Greeting (deterministic, $0)
Greeting
2. Deterministic category search (rule-based, no LLM)
Search common category - dien thoai
Search common category - laptop
3. Genuinely out-of-catalog term (deterministic empty result)
Search item the shop doesn't sell - thit tuoi

exec: pm.test('well-formed response either way (backend may or may not actually carry this item)', () => {

item.name: 4. Zero-result query expansion (replaces the old learning loop)
Search with an incomplete/colloquial term - balo di hoc

exec: pm.test('never asks the user to teach the system anymore', () => pm.expect(j.summary).to.not.eql('LEARNING_PROMPT'));
pm.test('found real products via query expansion retry, not just balo\'s literal 0 results', () => pm.expect(j.data.products.length).to.be.above(0));

item.name: Search a made-up nonsense term - should stay a clean 0-result, no crash

exec: pm.test('status 200 even when every expansion variant also returns 0', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('summary is SEARCH (deterministic empty result), not LEARNING_PROMPT', () => pm.expect(j.summary).to.eql('SEARCH'));

item.name: 5. Ambiguous query -> AI parser fallback
Long/ambiguous phrasing needs the LLM parser

exec: pm.test('price_max carried through from the sentence', () => pm.expect(j.data.memory.price_max).to.eql(15000000));

item.name: 6. Multi-turn memory continuity (laptop shopping thread)
Step 1 - search laptop under budget
Step 2 - ask about a subset already shown (used laptops)

exec: pm.test('memory was NOT wiped by cosmetic category re-wording (regression: used to memory.clear() here)', () => {

item.name: Step 3 - vague continuation referencing memory ('nao tôi nhớ...')

exec: pm.test('still finds used laptops from memory instead of a fresh, possibly wrong-category 0-result search', () => {

item.name: Step 4 - ask brand filter, still same thread
Step 5 - ambiguous reference among many products (crash regression)

exec: pm.test('status 200, NOT the old 500 AttributeError crash', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
// The AI parser isn't deterministic here - 'no' among 20 products can
// reasonably resolve either to PRODUCT_INFO (ask which one) or back to
// SEARCH (show the relevant set again). Either is fine; a 500 crash or
// a confidently wrong single-product guess would not be.
pm.test('resolves to SEARCH or PRODUCT_INFO, never crashes or silently guesses', () => {

item.name: 7. Topic pivot (memory should still reset on a genuine topic change)
Step 1 - search laptop
Step 2 - completely unrelated topic, same session

exec: pm.test('category switched away from laptop (memory reset on real pivot, did not over-correct into never clearing)', () => {
pm.test('results are shirts, not stale laptops', () => {

item.name: 8. PRODUCT_INFO self-heal (fuzzy slug -> real product)
Ask for detail using a loose product description
9. Reference resolution (single demonstrative reference)
Step 1 - search real estate
Step 2 - reference the first result, same session

exec: pm.test('resolves to PRODUCT_INFO for a specific product instead of a fresh garbled search', () => pm.expect(j.intent).to.eql('PRODUCT_INFO'));

item.name: 10. FAQ
FAQ question
11. Compare
Compare two products
12. Pagination (xem thêm)
Step 1 - search
Step 2 - xem thêm, same session
13. Advisory search (LLM formatter + lazy history path)
Advisory query - tu van

exec: pm.test('intent is SEARCH (advisory still search-based)', () => pm.expect(j.intent).to.eql('SEARCH'));

item.name: 14. Chitchat / out-of-scope (distinct from GREETING)
Off-topic request - tell a joke

exec: pm.test('classified as CHITCHAT, not the generic GREETING bucket', () => pm.expect(j.intent).to.eql('CHITCHAT'));
pm.test('does not reuse the shop-welcome greeting text verbatim', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('Bạn cần mình giúp gì hôm nay'));

item.name: 15. Gibberish query does not hallucinate an unrelated product
Nonsense search term

exec: pm.test('regression: query_expander must recognize gibberish and return empty products, not a random unrelated item', () => {

item.name: 16. Local-memory-filter must respect brand (regression: stale cache false negative)
Step 1 - search laptop (cache a non-Asus list)
Step 2 - ask for a brand not in the cached subset - must hit real search, not cache
17. COMPARE suggestion carries into a follow-up detail request
Step 1 - compare two products not in catalog

exec: pm.test('regression: related product suggestions must be saved to memory for follow-up reference', () => {

item.name: Step 2 - ask to see details of the suggested alternative

exec: pm.test('resolves to PRODUCT_INFO instead of an unrelated fresh search', () => pm.expect(j.intent).to.eql('PRODUCT_INFO'));

item.name: 18. Category-aware clarifying question (fix 2026-07-09: no more tech-flavored mismatch)
Broad food query never gets the electronics-flavored clarifying question

exec: pm.test('regression: food query must never get the laptop-flavored "đời mới nhất" question', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('đời mới nhất'));
pm.test('regression: food query must never get the laptop-flavored "học tập, làm việc, giải trí" question', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('học tập, làm việc, giải trí'));
pm.test('template placeholder was substituted, not left literal', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('{term}'));

item.name: Unresolved-category query stays universal-only (no tech-flavored guess)

exec: pm.test('regression: unresolved category must never get the laptop-flavored "đời mới nhất" question', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('đời mới nhất'));
pm.test('regression: unresolved category must never get the laptop-flavored "học tập, làm việc, giải trí" question', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('học tập, làm việc, giải trí'));

item.name: Appliance query gets its own phrasing, not tech's or food's (group separation)

exec: pm.test('appliance is its own group, not lumped into tech ("học tập, làm việc, giải trí" is laptop-only)', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('học tập, làm việc, giải trí'));
pm.test('appliance never gets the food-flavored "dự trữ" question', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('dự trữ'));
pm.test('template placeholder was substituted, not left literal', () => pm.expect(j.answer).to.not.include('{term}'));

item.name: 19. Backend rate-limit cooldown guard (fix 2026-07-09 - not Postman-assertable, see description)
NOTE - see description, no live 429 deliberately simulated here
item.description: The 2026-07-09 fix added: (1) search_engine.py caps live re-verify fan-out (10 for category-anchored vector candidates, 3 for unanchored) instead of re-verifying all ~20, and raises the miss threshold to 0.82 for unanchored vector search; (2) delippy_client.py adds an in-process cooldown that short-circuits calls for N seconds after the backend returns 429; (3) main.py returns a clean 503 + Retry-After instead of a raw 500 while that cooldown is active. None of this is safely testable from Postman: deliberately forcing dev.delippy.com into a real 429 to verify the cooldown would be doing the exact thing this fix exists to prevent. It was verified instead via direct code review and isolated logic checks (see chat history for this session). This request is just a placeholder health check so the folder isn't empty.

item.name: 20. Advisory follow-up only reuses cache for the SAME product (fix 2026-07-09)
Step 1 - search bánh tráng (seed cache)
Step 2 - advisory phrasing about a DIFFERENT product must re-search, not reuse cache

exec: pm.test('regression: a genuinely different product noun (bánh quy vs bánh tráng) must trigger a fresh search, not reuse the stale cached list', () => {

item.name: Step 3 (new session) - search áo thun (seed cache)
Step 4 - near-empty advisory query on the SAME topic must still ground in cache (no regression on the original bug #4 fix)

exec: pm.test('regression check: a near-empty advisory follow-up on the SAME topic still grounds in cache (must not silently drop to a different/empty result set)', () => {
